full_name: Steel, Corrosion-Resistant, Bars, Wire, Forgings, Rings, and Extrusions, 15Cr-4.5Ni-3.5Cu-0.30Cb (15-5 PH), Consumable Electrode Remelted, Solution Heat Treated, Precipitation-Hardenable (UNS S15500)
version_year: see SAE catalog for current revision
scope: Covers 15-5 PH martensitic precipitation-hardening stainless steel (UNS S15500) in bars, wire, forgings, flash-welded rings, and extrusions, consumable-electrode remelted (VAR or ESR), supplied solution heat treated and precipitation-hardenable. Used for aerospace parts requiring high strength and corrosion resistance to about 600F (316C) with better through-thickness (short-transverse) toughness and forgeability than 17-4 PH.

mechanical_properties.note: Typical bar properties per condition (aging temper). Values in ksi.

license_note: Composition and typical mechanical property data compiled from freely published aerospace-alloy mill/distributor datasheets (aircraftmaterials.com and equivalents) that cite the AMS 5659 requirements; no paywalled SAE standard text reproduced.
